name: 媒人

appearance.face: 圆熟世故，笑容殷勤，擅察言观色
appearance.distinguishing_features: 说话圆滑，常带职业性笑容

costume.typical_outfit: 体面但不逾矩的妇人外衫

visual_reference: Middle-aged Chinese matchmaker woman, shrewd smiling face, modest traditional dress, lively social energy, historical drama
personality: 圆滑、见风使舵、会说场面话
desire: 促成婚事，保住差事与脸面
flaw: 缺乏立场，只求息事宁人
scene_presence: 主要出现在开篇提亲场面中
